name: ​Scoro
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Scoro Does

​Scoro combines project management with high-level financial reporting. It’s designed to help you see not just if you were paid, but if that payment actually made you money after labor costs.

Source: Scoro

​Key Features

​🏆 Gantt Charts & Dependencies: Serious project planning for complex agency campaigns.

​🏆 Quoted vs. Actual Reporting: See exactly where projects go over budget in real-time.

​🏆 Retainer Management: Handles complex recurring contracts that involve a set number of hours per month.

​🏆 Utilization Reports: Know which of your team members are over-billed or under-utilized.

​Benefits of Scoro

​Scoro is fantastic for agencies that have graduated past simple "tasks" and now need to manage complex resources. It automates the "boring" part of billing by turning approved quotes directly into recurring invoices.

​Pricing

  • ​Core: $23.90/user/month
  • ​Growth: $38.90/user/month
  • ​Performance: $59.90/user/month

Scoro also offers custom Enterprise pricing. There are also discounts available when choosing to bill annually. 

​Note: Requires a minimum of 5 users, which can make it pricey for smaller teams.

​Pros

​✅ Comprehensive quoting, billing, and financial forecasting.

✅ Supports multiple currencies and retainer contracts.

✅ Detailed utilization and cost reports.

​Cons

​🚫 Interface can feel a bit "busy" and dated compared to modern SaaS.

🚫 The mobile app is significantly limited compared to the desktop version.

‍

What Customers Say

​“I like Scoros' quotation capability because it makes it easy to create standard quoting for our clients.”

– Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.
